title: Access to information and privacy at the Canada Revenue Agency - Canada.ca
content:
## Access to information and privacy at the Canada Revenue Agency
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) is subject to the legislative requirements of the Access to Information Act and the Privacy Act . The Access to Information and Privacy (ATIP) Directorate, part of the Public Affairs Branch, supports the CRA in meeting its requirements under both acts.

## Topics under access to information and privacy at the Canada Revenue Agency
- Your rights under the Access to Information Act and Privacy Act
- How to access information at the CRA
- The CRA's information holdings – Information about Info Source and the Reading Room Services
- Privacy impact assessment
- Frequently asked questions
- Contact the Access to Information and Privacy Directorate
- CRA's annual reports to Parliament on the administration of the Access to Information Act and the Privacy Act
- Access to information and privacy - Treasury Board of Canada
- Access to Information Act – Department of Justice
- Privacy Act – Department of Justice
- Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada's web site
- Office of the Information Commissioner of Canada's web site

Thank you for your feedback.
